syntax_3594.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3594.title: Custom spiral circle
syntax_3594.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawSpircle %number% %particlename% particle[s] [rotating] at %entity/locations% with id %string%, %number% point[s], density %number%, radius %number% and speed %number%[, offset %number%, %number%, %number%][, rotate %number%, %number%, %number%][, visibleTo %players%][, visibleRange %number%][, loop delay %number%]

syntax_3595.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3595.title: Emotes - Built in
syntax_3595.description: Using the names in the CustomEmotes.yml file you can play any custom emote or animation sequence you've made

en: Using the names in the CustomEmotes.yml file you can play any custom emote or animation sequence you've made

syntax_3596.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3596.title: Emotes - Custom
syntax_3596.description: Using the names in the CustomEmotes.yml file you can play any custom emote or animation sequence you've made

en: Using the names in the CustomEmotes.yml file you can play any custom emote or animation sequence you've made
Reloads the CustomEmotes.yml file
Stops an emote effect

syntax_3599.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3599.title: Remove Red Tint
syntax_3599.description: Removes the red tint from a player

en: Removes the red tint from a player

syntax_3600.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3600.title: Send Red Tint
syntax_3600.description: Sends red tint to a player. (Needs graphics set to fancy or in optifine vignettes)
syntax_3600.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] send[ red] tint to %players%[ with fadeTime %number%, intensity %number% and damageMode %boolean%]

en: Sends red tint to a player. (Needs graphics set to fancy or in optifine vignettes)

syntax_3601.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3601.title: Send trial packet
syntax_3601.description: Sends a fake trial packet to a player(The message CAN NOT be edited)

en: Sends a fake trial packet to a player(The message CAN NOT be edited)

syntax_3602.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3602.title: Spawn basic directional particles
syntax_3602.description: Most particles react differently to this effect using their individual built in mojang nature
syntax_3602.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] draw %number% %particlename% particle[s] at %entity/locations% with direction %vector% and speed %number%[, offset %number%, %number%, %number%][, id %string%][, visible[ ]to %players%][, visible[ ]range %number%][, [pulse][ ]delay %number%][, keep[ ][for] %timespan%]

en: Most particles react differently to this effect using their individual built in mojang nature

syntax_3604.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3604.title: Spawn colored particles
syntax_3604.description: Spawns specifically colored particles with options for them including offset like regular particles
syntax_3604.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] draw %number% colo[u]red (redstone|mobspell|mobspellambient) particle[s] at %entity/locations% with RGB %number%, %number%, %number%[, offset %number%, %number%, %number%][, id %string%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%][, randomColor %boolean%][, visibleTo %players%][, visibleRange %number%][, pulseDelay %number%][, keepFor %timespan%]

en: Spawns specifically colored particles with options for them including offset like regular particles

syntax_3605.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3605.title: Spawn material based directional particles
syntax_3605.description: Unlike normal directional particles this syntax allows input for the 2 compatible material type particles
syntax_3605.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] draw %number% directional (blockdust|itemcrack) particle[s] made of %itemstack% at %entity/locations% with direction %vector% and speed %number%[, offset %number%, %number%, %number%][, id %string%][, visibleTo %players%][, visibleRange %number%][, pulseDelay %number%][, keepFor %timespan%]

en: Unlike normal directional particles this syntax allows input for the 2 compatible material type particles

syntax_3606.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3606.title: Spawn material particles
syntax_3606.description: Specifically spawns material particles such as items or blocks(falling dust is a special case where it displays a color based on the block type used)
syntax_3606.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] draw %number% (blockcrack|blockdust|itemcrack|fallingdust)[ material]  particle[s] made of %itemstack% at %entity/locations%[, speed %number%][, offset %number%, %number%, %number%][, id %string%][, visibleTo %players%][, visibleRange %number%][, pulseDelay %number%][, keepFor %timespan%]

en: Specifically spawns material particles such as items or blocks(falling dust is a special case where it displays a color based on the block type used)

syntax_3608.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3608.title: Stop a particle effect
syntax_3608.description: Stops a single particle effect or a list of them

en: Stops a single particle effect or a list of them

syntax_3609.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3609.title: drawArc
syntax_3609.description: Draws an arc from one location or player to another. New as of v0.06.33-BETA
syntax_3609.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawArc particle %string%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, target %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], density %number%, height %number%, p[itch]M[ultiplier] %number%, visibleRange %number%[, dis[placement]X %number%, dis[placement]Y %number%, dis[placement]Z %number%][, dis[placement]X2 %number%, dis[placement]Y2 %number%, dis[placement]Z2 %number%][, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws an arc from one location or player to another. New as of v0.06.33-BETA

syntax_3610.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3610.title: drawAtom
syntax_3610.description: Draws an atom effect that follows the player or plays at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA
syntax_3610.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawAtom particle1 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], particle2 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed2 %number%][, ([offset]XYZ2|RGB2) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], innerPCount %number%, innerRadius %number%, outerPCount %number%, orbitCount %number%, start %number%, visibleRange %number%, rot[ation] %number%[, dis[placement]X %number%, dis[placement]Y %number%, dis[placement]Z %number%][, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws an atom effect that follows the player or plays at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA

syntax_3611.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3611.title: drawBand
syntax_3611.description: Draws a band effect that follows the player or plays at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA
syntax_3611.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawBand particle %string%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], visibleRange %number%[, dis[placement]X %number%, dis[placement]Y %number%, dis[placement]Z %number%][, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws a band effect that follows the player or plays at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA

syntax_3612.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3612.title: drawBreath
syntax_3612.description: Draws a 'fire breath' type effect at the players mouth or at a location. New as of v0.07.0-Beta
syntax_3612.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] draw[Dragon]Breath particle %string%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], arcPitch %number%, arcCount %number%, arcDensity %number%, arcSteps %number%, arcLength %number%, visibleRange %number%[, dis[placement]X %number%, dis[placement]Y %number%, dis[placement]Z %number%][, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws a 'fire breath' type effect at the players mouth or at a location. New as of v0.07.0-Beta

syntax_3613.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3613.title: drawCape
syntax_3613.description: Draws a cape on a players back using approx. 8x12 pixel images
syntax_3613.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawCape file %string%, center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isClientside %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%][, dyn[amic]Mode %boolean%][, scale %number%][, backDis[tance] %number%][, gravity %number%], visibleRange %number%[, pulseDelay %number%]

en: Draws a cape on a players back using approx. 8x12 pixel images

syntax_3614.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3614.title: drawCircle
syntax_3614.description: Draws a circle effect that follows the player or plays at a location. The only thing complex about this circle is its syntax. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA
syntax_3614.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] draw[Complex]Circle particle %string%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], randomRotation %boolean%, radius %number%, density %number%, start %number%, visibleRange %number%[, xR[otation] %number%, yR[otation] %number%, zR[otation] %number%][, dis[placement]X %number%, dis[placement]Y %number%, dis[placement]Z %number%][, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws a circle effect that follows the player or plays at a location. The only thing complex about this circle is its syntax. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA

syntax_3615.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3615.title: drawComplexSpiral
syntax_3615.description: Draws a spiral that follows the player or plays at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA
syntax_3615.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] draw[Complex]Spiral particle %string%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], clockwise %boolean%, scan %boolean%, radius %number%, density %number%, height %number%, effectMod %number%, start %number%, visibleRange %number%[, xR[otation] %number%, yR[otation] %number%, zR[otation] %number%][, dis[placement]X %number%, dis[placement]Y %number%, dis[placement]Z %number%][, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws a spiral that follows the player or plays at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA

syntax_3617.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3617.title: drawDisco
syntax_3617.description: Draws a disco ball type thing that follows the player or plays at a location. New as of v0.13.0-Beta
syntax_3617.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawDisco style %number%, particle %particlename%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], particle2 %particlename%[, material2 %itemstack%][, speed2 %number%][, ([offset]XYZ2|RGB2) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, onlyFor %players%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], maxLines %number%, lineLength %number%, sphereRadius %number%, sphereDensity %number%, lineDensity %number%, visibleRange %number%[, dis[placement]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, pulseDelay %number%]

en: Draws a disco ball type thing that follows the player or plays at a location. New as of v0.13.0-Beta

syntax_3620.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3620.title: drawHalo
syntax_3620.description: Draws a simple halo effect over the players head or at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA
syntax_3620.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] draw[Simple]Halo particle %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%][, solid %boolean%][, density %number%], visibleRange %number%[, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws a simple halo effect over the players head or at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA

syntax_3621.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3621.title: drawHeart
syntax_3621.description: Draws a heart shape at a player or location
syntax_3621.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawHeart particle %particlename%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], ySpin %number%, width %number%, height %number%, innerSpike %number%, compress %number%, density %number%, visibleRange %number%[, rot[ation]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, dis[placement]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, pulseDelay %number%]

en: Draws a heart shape at a player or location

syntax_3622.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3622.title: drawImage
syntax_3622.description: Draws a image effect that follows the player or plays at a location. Image files go in the skDragon plugin folder. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA
syntax_3622.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawImage file %string%, center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, randomRotation %boolean%,[ plane] %string%], pixelStepX %number%, pixelStepY %number%, scale %number%, visibleRange %number%[, xR[otation] %number%, yR[otation] %number%, zR[otation] %number%][, dis[placement]X %number%, dis[placement]Y %number%, dis[placement]Z %number%][, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws a image effect that follows the player or plays at a location. Image files go in the skDragon plugin folder. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA

syntax_3623.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3623.title: drawImage2
syntax_3623.description: Draws a image effect that follows the player or plays at a location. Image files go in the skDragon plugin folder. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA
syntax_3623.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawImage2 file %string%, center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, randomRotation %boolean%,[ plane] %string%], pixelStepX %number%, pixelStepY %number%, scale %number%, visibleRange %number%[, xR[otation] %number%, yR[otation] %number%, zR[otation] %number%][, dis[placement]X %number%, dis[placement]Y %number%, dis[placement]Z %number%][, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws a image effect that follows the player or plays at a location. Image files go in the skDragon plugin folder. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA

syntax_3624.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3624.title: drawItemFountain
syntax_3624.description: Tosses items around for a preset time that follow the player or play at a location. (don't make the time too long or bad things might happen xD ) Added in 0.09.0-BETA
syntax_3624.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawItemFountain %itemstack%, style %number%, center %entity/location%, id %string%, itemTime %timespan%, yVelocity %number%, radius %number%, density %number%[, dis[placement]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, pulseDelay %number%]

en: Tosses items around for a preset time that follow the player or play at a location. (don't make the time too long or bad things might happen xD ) Added in 0.09.0-BETA

syntax_3625.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3625.title: drawLine
syntax_3625.description: Draws a line from entity/location to entity/location options exist to set the length of the line as well as point with the player(it doesnt appear to follow the pitch/yaw of mobs, might require a movement update perhaps)
syntax_3625.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawLine particle %particlename%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%[, target %entity/location%], id %string%[, onlyFor %players%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%][, solid %boolean%][, density %number%][, length %number%][, zigZag count %number%, height %number%], visibleRange %number%[, dis[placement]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, pulseDelay %number%]

en: Draws a line from entity/location to entity/location options exist to set the length of the line as well as point with the player(it doesnt appear to follow the pitch/yaw of mobs, might require a movement update perhaps)

syntax_3626.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3626.title: drawNyanCat
syntax_3626.description: Draws a Nyan Cat (band) effect that follows the player or plays at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA
syntax_3626.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawNyanCat center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%], visibleRange %number%[, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws a Nyan Cat (band) effect that follows the player or plays at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA

syntax_3619.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3619.title: drawDot 2
syntax_3619.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawDot[ count %number%,] particle %particlename%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%][, colo[u]rOffset %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/locations%[, id %string%][, isClientside %players%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%][, randomColor %boolean%], visibleRange %number%[, pulseDelay %number%][, keepFor %timespan%]

syntax_3618.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3618.title: drawDot
syntax_3618.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawDot [count %number%,] particle %string%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/locations%[, id %string%][, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], visibleRange %number%[, pulseDelay %number%][, keepFor %timespan%]

syntax_3633.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3633.title: drawWings (4 colored)
syntax_3633.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawWings69 particle1 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], particle2 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed2 %number%][, ([offset]XYZ2|RGB2) %number%, %number%, %number%], particle3 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed3 %number%][, ([offset]XYZ3|RGB3) %number%, %number%, %number%], particle4 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed4 %number%][, ([offset]XYZ4|RGB4) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%][, flapSpeed %number%, flapRange %number%], angle %number%, height %number%, space %number%, visibleRange %number%[, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: 4 colored version of [drawWings](https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3632).

syntax_3603.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3603.title: Spawn colored directional particles
syntax_3603.description: Like material based directional particles but with a color spectrum based on different block types
syntax_3603.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] draw %number% (shade|red|green|blue|rainbow|full)[ scale %number%] colo[u]red directional (blockdust|itemcrack) particle[s] at %entity/locations% with direction %vector% and speed %number%[, offset %number%, %number%, %number%][, id %string%][, visibleTo %players%][, visibleRange %number%][, pulseDelay %number%][, keepFor %timespan%]

en: Like material based directional particles but with a color spectrum based on different block types

syntax_3607.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3607.title: Spawn more complex directional particle patterns using colorable particles
syntax_3607.description: Most particles react differently to this effect using their individual built in mojang nature
syntax_3607.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] draw %number% style %number% (redstone|mobspell|mobspellambient) particle[s] at %entity/locations% with direction %vector%, speed %number% and RGB %number%, %number%, %number%[, offset %number%, %number%, %number%][, id %string%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%][, randomColor %boolean%][, visibleTo %players%][, visibleRange %number%][, pulseDelay %number%][, keepFor %timespan%]

en: Most particles react differently to this effect using their individual built in mojang nature

syntax_3628.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3628.title: drawRings
syntax_3628.description: Ring effect like the circles around the drawAtom that follows the player or plays at a location. Added in 0.09.0-BETA -Warning- setting animated to true will be a bit resource heavy, but produces an interesting effect.
syntax_3628.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawRings particle %string%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], randomRotation %boolean%, animated %boolean%, radius %number%, ringCount %number%, ringDensity %number%, visibleRange %number%[, rot[ation]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, dis[placement]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, pulseDelay %number%]

en: Ring effect like the circles around the drawAtom that follows the player or plays at a location. Added in 0.09.0-BETA -Warning- setting animated to true will be a bit resource heavy, but produces an interesting effect.

syntax_3629.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3629.title: drawSphere
syntax_3629.description: Draws a sphere that follows the player or plays at a location. New as of v0.10.0-Beta
syntax_3629.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawSphere[ style] %number%, particle %string%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], radius %number%, density %number%, visibleRange %number%[, dis[placement]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, pulseDelay %number%]

en: Draws a sphere that follows the player or plays at a location. New as of v0.10.0-Beta

syntax_3630.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3630.title: drawText
syntax_3630.description: Draws text at a location or a player, it can also auto face where the player looks Uses system fonts(most fonts/unicodes show up as squares)
syntax_3630.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawText %string%, particle %particlename%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, (only[ ]for|visible[ ]to) %players%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%][, autoFace %boolean%][, invert %boolean%][, f[ont]Name %string%, f[ont]Style %fontstyle%, f[ont]Size %number%], scale %number%, visibleRange %number%[, rot[ation]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, dis[placement]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, pulseDelay %number%]

en: Draws text at a location or a player, it can also auto face where the player looks Uses system fonts(most fonts/unicodes show up as squares)

syntax_3631.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3631.title: drawWarpRings
syntax_3631.description: An assortment of different effects with a few shapes that play certain effects, some of which may or may not actually be considered 'warp' effects. I went a little bit nuts when I created this one, there are over 35 styles in it. Added in 0.09.0-BETA
syntax_3631.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawWarpRings style %number%, particle %string%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], scan %boolean%, height %number%, radius %number%, ringCount %number%, ringDensity %number%, visibleRange %number%[, rot[ation]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, dis[placement]XYZ %number%, %number%, %number%][, pulseDelay %number%][, keepFor %timespan%[, repeat %number%]]

en: An assortment of different effects with a few shapes that play certain effects, some of which may or may not actually be considered 'warp' effects. I went a little bit nuts when I created this one, there are over 35 styles in it. Added in 0.09.0-BETA

syntax_3632.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3632.title: drawWings
syntax_3632.description:
Draws a wing trail that follows the player or plays them at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA Added flapping animation in v0.10.0-BETA

4 colored version: https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3633
syntax_3632.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawWings[ style] %number%, particle1 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], particle2 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed2 %number%][, ([offset]XYZ2|RGB2) %number%, %number%, %number%], particle3 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed3 %number%][, ([offset]XYZ3|RGB3) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%][, flapSpeed %number%, flapRange %number%], angle %number%, height %number%, space %number%, visibleRange %number%[, tps %number%, second %number%]

en:
Draws a wing trail that follows the player or plays them at a location. New Syntax as of v0.06.0-BETA Added flapping animation in v0.10.0-BETA

4 colored version: https://skripthub.net/docs/?id=3633
Lists all currently running effects

syntax_3634.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3634.title: All id names
syntax_3634.description: Gets a list of all active id names used

en: Gets a list of all active id names used

syntax_3636.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3636.title: System fonts
syntax_3636.description: Gets a list of all system fonts for use in drawText

en: Gets a list of all system fonts for use in drawText

syntax_3616.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3616.title: drawCylinder
syntax_3616.description: Draws a cylinder that follows the player or plays at a location. New as of v0.07.0-Beta
syntax_3616.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawCylinder particle %string%[, material %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%], randomRotation %boolean%, isSolid %boolean%, radius %number%, density %number%, height %number%, sideRatio %number%, visibleRange %number%[, xR[otation] %number%, yR[otation] %number%, zR[otation] %number%][, dis[placement]X %number%, dis[placement]Y %number%, dis[placement]Z %number%][, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws a cylinder that follows the player or plays at a location. New as of v0.07.0-Beta

syntax_3627.creator: Blueyescat
syntax_3627.title: drawPlanet
syntax_3627.description: Draws a randomized two colored planet that follows the player or plays at a location. New as of v0.07.0-Beta
syntax_3627.syntax_pattern: [skDragon] drawPlanet particle1 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed %number%][, ([offset]XYZ|RGB) %number%, %number%, %number%], particle2 %string%[[, material] %itemstack%][, speed2 %number%][, ([offset]XYZ2|RGB2) %number%, %number%, %number%], center %entity/location%, id %string%[, isSingle %boolean%, %player%][, r[ainbow]M[ode] %boolean%][, rotation %boolean%,[ plane] %string%, rot[ation]Speed %number%][, orbit %boolean%, orbit[al]Radius %number%, orbit[al]Step %number%[, xR[otation] %number%, yR[otation] %number%, zR[otation] %number%]], radius %number%, density %number%, precision %number%, bumpHeight %number%, visibleRange %number%[, dis[placement]X %number%, dis[placement]Y %number%, dis[placement]Z %number%][, tps %number%, second %number%]

en: Draws a randomized two colored planet that follows the player or plays at a location. New as of v0.07.0-Beta
